field.title: week_number
field.formula: DATEPART([date], "week")

field.title: week
field.formula:
-- Выводим начало и конец недели
CONCAT(SPLIT(STR(DATETRUNC([date], "week")), "-", 3), '.', 
       SPLIT(STR(DATETRUNC([date], "week")), "-", 2), ' — ',
       SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date], "week"), 6)), '-', 3), '.', -- Добавляем 6 дней
       SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date], "week"), 6)), '-', 2), '.',
       RIGHT(SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date], "week"), 6)), '-', 1), 2)
       )
field.guid_formula:
-- Выводим начало и конец недели
CONCAT(SPLIT(STR(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week")), "-", 3), '.', 
       SPLIT(STR(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week")), "-", 2), ' — ',
       SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week"), 6)), '-', 3), '.', -- Добавляем 6 дней
       SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week"), 6)), '-', 2), '.',
       RIGHT(SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week"), 6)), '-', 1), 2)
       )

IF [total_followers_uae] > 0 THEN
    [Факт расход] / [total_followers_uae]
ELSE
    [Факт расход]
END

field.title: title-744262a0-8ab7-11ee-940e-bfa3d8ecbaf7
field.formula: datetrunc([date], "day")

field.title: title-83ed0160-8ab7-11ee-940e-bfa3d8ecbaf7
field.formula: datetrunc([date], "day")

field.title: dayofweek
field.formula:
CASE DATEPART([date], "dayofweek")
    WHEN 1 THEN "пн"
    WHEN 2 THEN "вт"
    WHEN 3 THEN "ср"
    WHEN 4 THEN "чт"
    WHEN 5 THEN "пт"
    WHEN 6 THEN "сб"
    WHEN 7 THEN "вс"
    ELSE CONCAT([date])
END
field.guid_formula:
CASE DATEPART([date_6pqd], "dayofweek")
    WHEN 1 THEN "пн"
    WHEN 2 THEN "вт"
    WHEN 3 THEN "ср"
    WHEN 4 THEN "чт"
    WHEN 5 THEN "пт"
    WHEN 6 THEN "сб"
    WHEN 7 THEN "вс"
    ELSE CONCAT([date_6pqd])
END

field.title: % CPF
field.formula:
IF AVG([cpf_plan]) > 0 THEN
    - ([cpf_uae] - AVG([cpf_plan])) / AVG([cpf_plan])
ELSE
    0
END
field.guid_formula:
IF AVG([cpf_9goh]) > 0 THEN
    - ([dcd95570-8a0e-11ee-8bf1-83d8c0739f76] - AVG([cpf_9goh])) / AVG([cpf_9goh])
ELSE
    0
END
